name: False River Park
description: False River Park is a place to play pickleball in New Roads, LA. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: New Roads False River Park
description: New Roads False River Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New Roads, LA. There are 4 outdoor concrete and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.
